subject: [DMaaP|DOC|COMMON|GENERIC] Updating DMaaP Charts with Service Account
commit_message:
[DMaaP|DOC|COMMON|GENERIC] Updating DMaaP Charts with Service Account

Adjusting the location of serviceAccountName in deployment.yaml and statefulset.yaml
Adjusting repositry to '@local' in requirements.yaml
Some cosmetic changes

Issue-ID: OOM-2702

Change-Id: Id63ae33ce92a5192d43ff0f782487b3974fc5f41

Signed-off-by: farida azmy <farida.azmy.ext@orange.com>
Change-Id: If6325ee6f4eebf48a7b9420839612e656dd147df

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/1085/ : FAILURE

The line in commit is too long: it has a size of 84 instead of 80 characters maximum.

Line in cause: Adjusting the location of serviceAccountName in deployment.yaml and statefulset.yaml ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/1085/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/1085/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-commit-lint/1085
